title: Allow more than 50 columns when importing an Excel file. This would be very helpful when creating a form on Monday
excerpt: I am creating a long form on Monday.com and when I tried to import my Excel file, it gave me the error, only permitted 50 columns. This is strange because Monday allows to create a board, larger than 50 columns, but limi…

posts.author: AC123 (Ad Coff)
posts.cookedHtml: I am creating a long form on Monday.com and when I tried to import my Excel file, it gave me the error, only permitted 50 columns. This is strange because Monday allows to create a board, larger than 50 columns, but limits Excel importing. Allowing more than 50 columns when importing an Excel file would be very helpful when creating a large/long form on Monday.
